query: I just got a call from a new customer while driving. How do I get them into the system quickly without typing a whole novel on my phone?
My last software said it sent quotes, but they ended up in spam and I lost $5k. How does Jobber's 'Automatic Follow-up' on the Grow plan actually ensure I'm not just shouting into the void?
I need my team to see the exact GPS coordinates for the gate code, not just the house address. Where do I put that so it pops up the second they arrive?
I'm on Connect. If I send an 'On My Way' text, does it come from my personal cell number? I don't want clients texting me at 11 PM on Sundays!
I have 20 invoices from today. Is there a way to just send them all at once? I've got a soccer game to get to and can't click 'Send' 20 times.
I want to track exactly how much mulch we use per job vs. what I quoted. Can I make a 'required field' in a Job Form that stops them from closing the job without entering a quantity?
I'm looking at my 'Transaction List.' It says a payment is 'Pending.' My bank says it's not there. Who is lying to me, and where is my money?
I just connected QuickBooks. Does it take all my old stuff from 2019 and put it into Jobber? I'm scared it's going to make a mess of my books.
I have a recurring contract for 12 months. If the client cancels in month 3, do I have to delete 9 individual visits manually?
I want to offer three different price tiers for a roof cleaning—Basic, Pro, and Deluxe. How do I set it up so they can only pick one and the others disappear?
I heard Grow has 'Campaigns.' I'm skeptical. If I blast my 500 past customers, how do I know I'm not just paying for a one-way trip to their 'Unsubscribe' button?
I put the 'Request a Quote' button on my Facebook page. When someone clicks it, do I get a text, or does it just magically show up in the calendar?
A client wants to pay half now and half in 30 days. How do I track that 'Partial Payment' without the invoice looking like it's overdue the whole time?
My technician says he can't see the 'Notes' I wrote. Is he just blind, or is there a setting I missed to make my internal notes visible to the crew?
You guys have 'Job Costing.' Does that account for the gas my guys use, or just the hours they clock in? I need to know my actual profit, not a 'best guess' number.
I want to use 'Route Optimization' but I'm worried it's going to put my morning coffee stop in the middle of a job. How do I tell it which house to start at?
I'm standing in a driveway. Can I just snap a photo of the house and attach it to the quote right now, or do I have to wait until I'm back at my desk?
I want an email to go out exactly 24 hours after a job is done asking for a Google review, but only for certain services. How do I filter who gets that?
I use Mailchimp for my newsletters. If I connect it to Jobber, is it going to create 400 duplicate contacts? I've spent years cleaning that list up.
Can I take a credit card payment over the phone on the Connect plan, or do I have to be standing right in front of them with a card reader?
I have two guys on one truck. Can they both clock into the same job at the same time, or will that mess up the labor tracking?
I want to know which of my Google Ads is actually bringing in the most revenue, not just clicks. Can I tag a lead with a 'Source' that follows them all the way to the invoice?
I see a 'Tax' column. Does Jobber calculate my state sales tax automatically, or do I have to do the math every time I make an invoice?
What happens if a job takes longer than planned? Does the next job on the calendar move automatically, or am I going to be looking at a screen full of red 'overdue' boxes?
I want to add a 'Terms and Conditions' contract that they have to sign with their finger before they can even see the 'Accept Quote' button. Is that a thing?
If I change a job time, does the customer get an email automatically? I don't want to call everyone just because I'm running 20 minutes late.
I have a property manager who pays for 10 different houses on one check. How do I apply that one payment to 10 different invoices without losing my mind?
My employees are 'forgetting' to clock out. Can I set up a geofence that reminds them to clock out when they drive away from the customer's house?
I have a list of 1,000 leads from a home show. Can I just drop them into Jobber as 'Leads' so they don't count as 'Clients' yet? I don't want to pay for people I haven't sold to yet.
I need a report that shows me how much money I'm *going* to make next month based on the schedule. Where's the 'Projected Income' button?
If I use the FleetSharp integration, does it actually show my truck's location on the Jobber map, or is it just another tab I have to keep open?
I hate 'Anytime' jobs. If I put a job on the calendar without a time, my guys just skip it. How do I make sure it stays at the top of their list until it's done?
I made a mistake on a quote I already sent. Can I edit it and have the link they already have update automatically, or do I have to send a whole new email?
A client says they never got my email. Can I see if they opened it, or am I just supposed to take their word for it?
I do monthly maintenance. Can I just store a client's credit card and charge it automatically every time we finish the visit, or do they have to click 'Pay' every month?
I want to see a history of every time a technician changed a status. If they marked it 'Complete' then changed it back, will I know?
I'm on a job and someone walks up and asks for an estimate. Can I just scan their driver's license or something to get their info in fast?
I want to calculate commissions for my sales guy. Does Jobber track who sold the job vs. who did the work, and can I run a report on that?
I use 'CompanyCam' for all my photos. Do those sync over to the Jobber job automatically, or do I have to download and re-upload them?
I have a job that takes 3 days. I want 3 different techs on it for different parts. Do I have to make 3 separate jobs, or can I split one job across them?
Customers always try to haggle. Can I put a 'Discount' line on the quote that shows them exactly how much I'm taking off so they stop asking for more?
I want to send a 'Happy Birthday' text to my clients. Is there a way to store their birthday and have it trigger a message?
The job is done and I'm standing with the client. How do I show them the invoice on my phone so they can just pay me right now?
I have a specific 'Checklist' for cleaning a pool. Can I make it so the tech *has* to check off every item before the 'Finish' button even appears?
I'm sick of tire-kickers. Can I charge a 'Consultation Fee' through the lead form before I even agree to come out and look at the job?
I noticed my 'Aged Receivables' is high. Can I see a list of every client who hasn't paid in 60 days and bulk-email them a reminder?
If I connect my Google Calendar, will my wife's dentist appointments show up on my Jobber schedule? That would be a disaster.
I need to reschedule a whole day because of rain. Is there a way to 'drag and drop' the entire Tuesday onto Wednesday without opening every job?
I want to see how long my salesperson spends looking at a quote before they send it. Does Jobber track 'Time Spent' on the drafting phase?
Every time I send a text, I feel like I'm bothering people. Does the system show me if they've opted out of marketing so I don't get a spam complaint?
I have a two-man crew. I want the Lead Tech to see the pricing on the app, but the Helper should only see the address and the checklist. Can I hide the dollars from one of them?

I do big landscaping jobs. I need to bill 30% upfront as a deposit, 40% halfway, and the rest at the end. How do I do 'Progress Invoicing' without the customer thinking I'm billing them for the same thing twice?
I'm tired of playing phone tag. Can I just send a link where the customer picks their own time for an estimate, or do I have to approve every single one?
I want to track my equipment. Can I 'assign' my big power washer to a specific job so I know which truck it's on today?
I'm looking at my 'Tax Summary.' Does this separate the tax I collected for the city vs. the state, or do I have to pull a CSV and do that myself?
I sent a quote for 5 trees. The client only wants to do 3. Can I change the quantity on my phone while I'm standing there, or do I need to go 'Edit' the whole thing?
If I put the lead form on my site, is it going to notify me via text immediately? If I don't call them in 5 minutes, they've already moved to the next guy on Google.
I'm using 'NiceJob' for reviews. Does Jobber tell NiceJob the second I finish the work, or should I wait until they actually pay the invoice?
I've got 50 recurring lawn clients. If a holiday falls on a Monday, can I shift all 50 jobs to Tuesday with one click, or is my holiday going to be spent clicking 'Edit' 50 times?
When a customer pays online, do they get a receipt automatically? I don't want them calling me to ask 'did you get it?' every time.
I'm using 'Job Forms.' If a tech takes a photo of a broken window before they start, can I make sure that photo is *attached* to the job forever so they can't blame us later?
I want to send an email to everyone I haven't worked with in 6 months with a 10% off coupon. Does 'Campaigns' know who hasn't had a visit lately?
Where do I find how much I paid in credit card fees last month? I need that number for my accountant right now.
I have different sales tax for different counties. If I drive across the county line, does Jobber update the tax rate based on the job address automatically?
I have 'Lead Labels.' Can I set a rule that any lead labeled 'Urgent' turns red on my dashboard?
I use 'QuickBooks Desktop,' not Online. Is there any way to make this work, or am I stuck doing double-entry for the rest of my life?
How do I see my schedule for the whole month? The 'Day View' is too cramped when I'm trying to plan out my big projects.
If I 'Record a Payment' as Cash, does it still send the customer a notification? I need to make sure they know their balance is zero.
I want to use 'Line Item Images' on my invoices so they can see exactly what 'Part #502' looks like. Is that possible on the mobile app?
I'm on Connect. A customer texted the Jobber number and I didn't see it for three days. Why didn't my phone buzz? This makes me look unprofessional.
I need to see which of my services is making the most money. Is there a report that breaks down revenue by 'Service Type'?
Can I change the 'Reply-To' email address on my quotes? I want them to go to my office manager, not my personal inbox.
I want to embed the 'Request Form' into a specific page on my website, but I want it to look like my brand, not like a Jobber ad. Can I change the colors?
Can I connect my 'SumUp' card reader to Jobber, or do I have to use the Jobber Card Reader?
I have 'Team Leads' and 'Helpers.' If I assign a job to the 'Team,' does everyone get the notification, or just the person I put first?
I have a 'Late Fee' policy. Can Jobber automatically add a 5% fee if the invoice isn't paid within 15 days, or do I have to manually go in and add a line item?
My tech is at the house but forgot his password. Can I reset it for him from the field, or does he have to do it through his email?
I want to use 'Variable Tags' in my emails. Can I make it say 'Hey [First Name], thanks for choosing [Company Name]' automatically?
I'm worried about overhead. Does your 'Profitability' report include the time my guys spend driving, or just the time they are clocked into the job?
I just sold a job on the spot. How do I turn this quote into a job immediately without going back to the dashboard?
I want to see a log of every phone call my team makes to a lead. Does Jobber track call duration if they dial from the app?
If I use 'Zapier' to connect to my CRM, does it sync both ways? If I update a phone number in my CRM, does it update in Jobber?
I do HVAC. If I have an emergency 'No Heat' call, how do I see who the closest tech is right now without calling all five of them?
Is there a 'Bulk Mark as Paid' button? I just got 10 checks in the mail and I don't want to open 10 different screens.
I want to track 'Time to Completion.' Can I run a report that shows me which of my techs is taking the longest on a standard 'Oil Change' service?
If I send a quote via text, does the customer see a link or just a bunch of text? I want it to look professional, not like a scam.
I'm looking at my 'Bad Debt.' If I delete an invoice because the guy never paid, does it disappear from my QuickBooks too, or will my books be out of sync?
I want to set an 'Expiration Date' on my quotes. Can Jobber automatically mark a quote as 'Archived' if they don't sign it within 7 days?
I have a lot of 'Requests' sitting there. Can I select 5 of them and assign them all to my estimator at once?
I use 'Broadly' for customer engagement. How does the data bridge work—is it real-time or does it sync once a night?
I'm setting up a recurring job. What's the difference between 'Fixed' and 'Monthly on the second Tuesday'? I don't want to mess up my calendar for the year.
I have a customer who wants to pay with a physical check but I'm 2 hours away. Does Jobber have a way for them to take a photo of the check, or am I driving out there?
I'm running out of storage on my phone because of all the job photos. Does Jobber store them in the cloud, or are they taking up my phone's memory?
I want to see the 'Email History' for a specific client. Can I see exactly when they opened the invoice and from what IP address?
What is a 'Deposit' vs. a 'Payment'? If I take money before the job starts, where does it show up in my reports?
I want to add a PDF of my insurance certificate to every quote. Do I have to attach it manually every time, or can I set it as a default?
I'm on the 'Leads' tab. How do I quickly see which leads I haven't called back yet? I don't want anyone falling through the cracks.
I use 'Gusto' for payroll. Does Jobber sync the 'Clock In/Out' times directly to Gusto, or do I have to export a CSV first?
I want to use 'Automatic Manifests' for my chemical applications. Does Jobber track which batch of fertilizer I used on which house?
I'm tired of 'Merchant Fees.' If I use Jobber Payments, is there a hidden 'monthly fee' just to keep my account active?
I have a technician who is always 'forgetting' to hit the Start Timer. Can I manually edit his start time from my phone while he’s still on-site, or do I have to wait until the job is closed?
I want to set up 'Subscription Billing' for my monthly window cleaning. If the customer's card expires, does Jobber automatically stop the service, or do I get an alert to call them?
I’m looking at a quote. How do I add a 10% 'Friends and Family' discount without making a whole new line item for it?
I keep getting calls from customers asking when we’re coming. I send the 'On My Way' text, but they say they didn't see it. Is there a way to send it as an email AND a text at the same time?
I need a 'Safety Checklist' that my guys must complete before they can see the client’s address. I don't want them driving until they've confirmed they have their PPE. How do I lock that down?
If I get a lead through my website, can I make it so they automatically get a 'Thank You' email with my price list attached?
I just ran a 'Refund' on Jobber. Does that money come out of my bank account immediately, or does it just sit as a credit on their account for next time?

I use 'QuickBooks Online.' If I change an address in Jobber because the customer moved, does it fix it in QuickBooks, or am I going to be sending invoices to the wrong house in my accounting software?
I have 'Buffer Time' between jobs. Can I set Jobber to automatically add 15 minutes of travel time to every appointment so my guys aren't always back-to-back?
Can I hide the 'Tip' line on my invoices? I think it looks tacky for my high-end consulting business.
My tech is on a job and realized he needs an extra part. Can he add that to the job on his app, or do I have to do it from the office so the invoice stays correct?
I want to use 'Referral Tracking.' If a customer refers a friend, can I tag them in Jobber and give them a credit that automatically applies to their next invoice?
I'm looking at 'Client Spend.' I want to see my top 10 customers by revenue for last year. Is there a specific report for 'Whales'?
Every time I send a quote, the customer asks for a 'Cash Discount.' Can I put two different totals on one quote—one for card and one for cash?
I have 3 different estimators. Can I set Jobber to 'Round Robin' new leads to them so everyone gets a fair share of the work?
I use 'Mailchimp.' Does Jobber send the customer's 'Tag' (like 'VIP' or 'Landscaping') over to Mailchimp so I can send targeted emails?
I want to see the 'Map View' but I only want to see the jobs assigned to ME, not the whole company. How do I filter the map?
I have a client who wants to pay 5 separate invoices with one credit card transaction. How do I 'Batch' those together so I don't get hit with 5 transaction fees?
I do 'Multi-Day' jobs. If my guy clocks in at 8 AM and out at 4 PM for three days straight, does Jobber show me the total labor cost for the whole project in real-time?
I want to change the 'Subject Line' of my invoice emails. Right now it just says 'Invoice from [Company].' Can I make it say 'Your clean home is ready!'?
My accountant needs a 'Profit and Loss' statement. Does Jobber do that, or do I have to use QuickBooks for the actual P&L?
I want to see the 'Conversion Rate' for each of my salespeople. Who is closing the most quotes, and what is the average dollar amount for each?
I’m getting leads at 2 AM. Can I set an 'Auto-Reply' text that says 'We're closed, we'll call you at 8 AM,' or does it just sit there until I wake up?
I use 'Zapier' to send my Jobber leads into a Google Sheet. If I delete a lead in Jobber, does it delete it from the Sheet, or is that a one-way street?
I have a 'Meeting' that isn't a job. Can I block off 2 hours on the calendar for a team lunch so no one accidentally schedules a quote then?
I want to send an invoice to a husband and a wife at the same time. Can I put two email addresses on one 'Client' profile?
I need to print a 'Work Order' for a tech who doesn't like using the app. Where is the print button for a single job?
I want to use 'Two-Way Texting' to send a video to a client showing them a leak. Can I attach MP4 files in the Jobber messenger?
I see 'Collected' vs 'Banked.' What’s the difference? I just want to know how much cash is actually in my pocket today.
A client wants a quote for 'Weekly' vs 'Bi-Weekly' service. Can I show both options on one quote so they can just click the one they want?
I want to track 'Lead-to-Quote' time. How long does it take my team to respond to a web request? Is there a report for 'Response Speed'?
If I connect 'Stripe' instead of 'Jobber Payments,' do I still get the same reporting inside the Jobber dashboard, or is it all hidden in Stripe?
I have 5 trucks. If one breaks down, can I select all of its jobs for the day and 'Reassign' them to the other 4 trucks in one go?
Does Jobber work with Apple Pay? All my younger clients keep asking if they can just tap their phone.
I want to see 'Audit Logs' for my inventory. If a tech says we're out of 'Part A,' I want to see who used the last one and when.
I’m worried about 'No-Shows.' Can I set a reminder that texts the customer 1 hour before the tech arrives, not just 24 hours?
I need to export my 'Expenses' for the year. I've been snapping photos of receipts in Jobber—does it export the actual images or just the data?
Can I add a 'YouTube' link to my quote to show a demo of the product I'm installing? I want it to be clickable for the client.
I want to customize the 'Lead Form' so that it asks for the square footage of their house. Can I add 'Custom Fields' to the web request?
I use 'Google Reviews.' Does Jobber automatically send the link when the invoice is paid, or do I have to do it manually every time?
I’m looking at the 'Grid View.' Can I hide the techs who aren't working today so I have more room on my screen?
I have a client who overpaid by $50. How do I keep that as a 'Credit' on their account so it automatically deducts from their next bill?
What happens if my tech loses internet connection in a basement? Can he still clock out and take photos in the app?
I want to send a mass text to all my Tuesday clients because of a storm. Can I filter my 'Client List' by 'Next Visit Date'?
I need to track 'Equipment Depreciation.' Can I add my trucks as 'Assets' in Jobber and track their maintenance costs against the revenue they generate?
I want my quotes to have a 'Professional' look. Can I change the font and the layout, or am I stuck with the standard Jobber template?
I saw 'Lead Sources.' Can I manually type in 'Met at Home Depot' or do I have to pick from a list you made?
I use 'LSA' (Google Local Services Ads). If I get a lead there, does it pop into Jobber automatically or do I have to copy/paste it?
I want to see a 'Heat Map' of where most of my jobs are. Does Jobber show me which neighborhoods I'm most active in so I can plan my marketing?
If a customer disputes a charge, does Jobber help me fight it, or am I on my own with the bank?
I have a 'floating' job that needs to happen sometime this week, but I don't care when. How do I put it on the calendar without picking a specific day so I can just slot it in when we have a gap?
I do commercial work. They pay on 'Net 60' terms. Can I set up the invoice to not show as 'Overdue' until 60 days have passed, or is it going to nag them every week?
I accidentally deleted a job. Is there an 'Undo' button, or did I just lose all those notes and photos forever?
I want to send a mass email, but I want to exclude anyone who has an open quote. I don't want to offer a discount to people I'm already negotiating with. How do I filter them out?
I'm applying for a loan and need to show my 'Year-over-Year' growth. Which report gives me a quick comparison of this February vs. last February?
If I send a quote and the customer 'Archives' it, do I get a notification? I want to know the second they decide not to go with us so I can call and ask why.
I saw 'Client Hub.' Can a brand new lead log in there to request work, or do they have to be an actual customer first?
I use 'FleetSharp.' Can I set an alert in Jobber if a tech is idling their truck for more than 15 minutes at a job site?
I have a job that needs two different visits—one for prep and one for the actual work. How do I link them so they stay together on the schedule?
I take a lot of cash. If I record a cash payment, does Jobber take a percentage of that as a 'platform fee' or is that only for credit cards?
I want to track 'Material Waste.' Can I add a field to my Job Forms where techs enter how much product was left over, and can I report on that by tech?
I want my 'On My Way' text to include a link to my technician's bio and photo so the customer feels safe. How do I customize that message?
My bank statement says 'Jobber Pay' but the amount doesn't match any single invoice. How do I figure out which invoices were included in that one deposit?
Can I see which of my employees created a quote? I need to know who to talk to if the pricing is wrong.
I'm buying leads from a third party. If I import them, can Jobber automatically flag any duplicates so I don't pay for the same lead twice?
I use 'Zapier' to connect to my smart lightbulbs. Can I make my office lights turn green every time a quote is approved? (I'm serious, I love this stuff!)
I'm looking at the calendar on my phone. How do I switch from 'List View' to 'Map View' so I can see where my next job is?
If I use 'Automatic Invoice Reminders,' what time of day do they go out? I want them to hit the customer's inbox at 9 AM sharp, not at midnight.
My guys are 'ghost clocking'—starting the timer before they even get out of the truck. Is there a way to see their GPS location at the exact moment they hit 'Start'?
A customer called and said they 'unsubscribed' by accident. How do I opt them back in so they can get their invoices again?
I want to calculate my 'Customer Acquisition Cost.' Can Jobber tell me how much revenue I generated from people who came through my 'Spring Sale' lead source?
I want to add a 'Video Greeting' to my Client Hub so when they look at a quote, they see a video of me explaining the work. Is that possible?
I have 50 new leads. Can I 'Bulk Archive' the ones that haven't responded in 30 days so my dashboard isn't so messy?
I use 'QuickBooks.' If I mark an invoice as 'Paid' in QuickBooks, does it sync back to Jobber, or is it only a one-way street from Jobber to QB?
I have a job that requires a specific permit. Can I set a 'Dependency' so the job can't be scheduled until the 'Permit Received' task is checked off?
I want to offer 'Buy Now, Pay Later' like Affirm or Klarna. Does Jobber Payments have a way for customers to do monthly installments for big jobs?
I'm in a dead zone with no cell service. If I finish a job and hit 'Complete,' will it update whenever I get back to a signal?
I want to send a text to every customer who had a 'Tree Trimming' service last year to remind them it's time for a prune. How do I find that specific list?
I found a mistake in my 'Tax' settings from three months ago. If I fix it now, will it update all my old invoices, or just the new ones?
What's my 'Close Rate' for this month? I need to know if I need to spend more on ads or if my sales team is just slacking.
If I use the 'Request Form,' can I block specific IP addresses or email domains? I'm getting a lot of spam from 'competitors' just checking my prices.
I want to use 'CompanyCam' to create a 'Before/After' gallery on my website. Does Jobber send the photos back to CompanyCam after the tech uploads them?
I want to see my team's 'Utilization Rate.' How many hours are they actually working vs. how many hours are they just 'Available' on the clock?
I have a customer who wants to pay with two different credit cards for one invoice. Can I process two separate card payments on one bill?
I have a 10-step 'Safety Protocol.' If a tech skips step 4, do I get an alert, or do I have to manually check every job form every night?
I love emojis! Can I put a 'Sparkles' emoji in my automated text messages, or will it show up as a weird block on the customer's phone?
I'm looking at 'Gross Margin' by service. Why does my 'Mowing' service show a higher margin than my 'Irrigation' when the parts for irrigation are so expensive?
Can I set a 'Quote Follow-up' to happen after 2 days, but ONLY if the quote is over $1,000? I don't want to chase the small stuff.
If I add a lead manually, can I see who added it and when? I need to track which office staff member is the most productive.
I use 'Thumbtack.' If I connect it to Jobber, do I still have to pay Thumbtack the 'lead fee' or does Jobber handle the billing for both?
I want to use 'AI' to predict how long a job will take based on the square footage. Does Jobber have an 'Auto-Estimate' duration feature?
I sent an invoice but the customer says the total is wrong. If I edit the invoice now, does the old link they have still work or do I need to re-send it?
I want to see a list of every 'Internal Note' made today. I'm worried my techs are saying things about clients they shouldn't be.
I want to set up a 'VIP' phone number that bypasses the automated system. Can I tag specific clients so their calls get routed differently?
I want to give my techs a 'Bonus' based on the tips they get. Does Jobber show me a report of tips broken down by technician?
I accidentally deleted a quote I spent an hour on. Is there a 'Trash' bin I can pull it out of, or is it gone?
I want to see a 'Funnel Report.' How many people clicked my ad, filled out the lead form, got a quote, and then actually paid? Where is that data?
If I use 'Mailchimp,' can I make it so that if a customer leaves a 1-star review on Google, they get removed from my marketing list?
I have a 'No-Show' policy where I charge $50. If I mark a job as 'Canceled,' can I automatically trigger an invoice for that fee?
I want to see my 'Average Days to Pay' by technician. I think one of my guys is better at getting clients to pay on-site than the others.
I have 10 techs but only 5 ladders. Can I track 'Equipment' as a resource in Jobber so I don't accidentally schedule 6 jobs that require a ladder at the same time?
I have a client who wants to pay with a physical check but they want me to scan it. Does the Jobber mobile app have a 'check capture' feature like my banking app?
I want to put a 'Book Now' link in my Instagram bio. Does that link go straight to my calendar or do they have to fill out a request form first?
I'm using 'Job Forms.' If my tech finds a safety hazard, can that form automatically trigger an 'Alert' email to me immediately so I can pull them off the job?
I'm looking at 'Sales Tax.' If I have a tax-exempt customer (like a non-profit), how do I mark them so they never get charged tax on any invoice?
Can I see if a customer has looked at a quote more than once? If they've opened it 5 times today, I want to call them while they're thinking about it.
I want to run a contest. Can I track which lead came from my 'QR Code' on my truck vs. my 'QR Code' on my business cards?
I use 'QuickBooks Online.' If I delete a payment in Jobber because the check bounced, does it delete the payment in QuickBooks too, or do I have to fix it in both?
I'm on the 'Waitlist.' How do I quickly see which jobs on the waitlist are closest to where I am right now so I can fill a gap in my day?
I want to charge a 'Fuel Surcharge' on every invoice automatically based on the mileage driven to the job. Can Jobber calculate that for me?
My tech says his 'Map' isn't working. Is there a way for me to 'Ping' his location from the dashboard to see if his phone's GPS is even on?
I want to use 'Two-Way Texting' to handle complaints. Is there a way to 'Close' a text thread so it's archived once the issue is resolved?
I need to know my 'Monthly Recurring Revenue' (MRR). Which report shows me exactly how much guaranteed money I have coming in from contracts next month?
Can I add a 'Required Attachment' to a quote? I want the customer to have to upload a photo of their circuit breaker before they can accept the quote.
If I 'Decline' a lead because I'm too busy, does Jobber send them a polite email, or do I just look like I'm ignoring them?
I want to connect Jobber to my 'Smart Home' hub. Can I make my office coffee maker start brewing whenever a technician clocks into their first job of the day?
How do I print a 'Daily Schedule' for my crew? They prefer having a piece of paper on the dashboard of the truck.
I noticed an invoice was 'Edited' after it was paid. Can I see a version history to see what was changed and who changed it?
I have a 'No-Compete' agreement with my techs. Can I block them from seeing the customer's phone number so they can't steal my clients on the side?
Can I change the 'Notification Sound' on my phone for Jobber alerts? I want it to sound like a cash register whenever I get a new lead!
I need to pay my sales tax by the end of the day. Does Jobber tell me exactly what I *owe* or just what I *collected*?
I want to track 'Quote Revisions.' If I send 3 different versions of a quote, can I see which version the customer actually liked best?
I'm getting 'Ghost Leads'—people who fill out the form with fake numbers. Can Jobber verify the phone number is real before it lets them submit the form?
If I connect 'Google Calendar,' can I make it so that my 'Personal' events show up as 'Busy' blocks on my Jobber schedule so my staff doesn't book over them?
I want to use 'Geofencing' to automatically clock my guys in when they pull into the driveway. Does Jobber do that, or do they still have to tap a button?
I have a client who wants an 'Itemized' invoice but I only want to show them the 'Total' price. How do I hide the individual line item costs?
If I delete an employee who quit, what happens to all the photos and notes they uploaded? Do they disappear with the user account?
Can I set a 'Do Not Disturb' time for my Jobber number so I don't get 'Two-Way Text' notifications after 7 PM?
I want to see 'Profitability per Zip Code.' I think I'm spending too much on gas to get to the north side of town. Where is that report?
How do I add a 'Signature' box to my quotes? I want them to sign it with their finger on my iPad right there in the living room.
I have a list of old customers I want to 'Re-Activate.' Can I import them as 'Leads' so I can track my outreach progress without making them 'Active' clients again?
I use 'QuickBooks.' If I have a 'Credit' in QuickBooks for a customer, does it show up in Jobber so I know they have a balance to use?
I want to see 'Travel Time' on the calendar. Is there a way to show the drive time between Job A and Job B so I know if my guys are lollygagging?
Can I take a payment through 'Venmo' and record it in Jobber, or do I have to use 'Jobber Payments' for everything?
I have a 'Chemical Tracking' requirement for the state. Can Jobber generate a report showing every time a specific 'Line Item' (like a pesticide) was used?
I sent a 'Review Request' and the customer gave me a 5-star review. Does Jobber show that review on my dashboard, or do I have to go to Google to see it?
What's the difference between 'Invoiced Sales' and 'Collected Revenue'? My accountant says these are very different things and I'm confused.
I want to make my quotes look 'Fun.' Can I add a background image or a 'Welcome' video to the Client Hub page where they see the quote?
I want to track 'Employee Sales Performance.' Who is converting the most leads into actual jobs, and what is their 'Close Ratio'?
I use 'Broadly.' If I send a review request through Jobber, will it conflict with the one Broadly sends, or do they talk to each other?
I'm looking at my 'Week View.' Can I change the start of the week to Monday instead of Sunday? It makes more sense for my business.
I have a customer who wants to pay 'Retainer' upfront. How do I record a $2,000 payment that isn't attached to an invoice yet?
I want to use 'QR Codes' on my equipment so my techs can scan it and see the 'Owner's Manual.' Can I store a PDF manual on a Jobber 'Asset'?
A customer is harassing my office staff through the Jobber messenger. Can I 'Block' their number so they can't text us anymore?
I need a 'Cash Flow Forecast' for the next 90 days. Does Jobber show me my expected revenue based on upcoming recurring jobs?
I want to add a 'Disclaimer' that only appears on quotes for 'Electrical Work' and not for 'Plumbing.' How do I set up conditional text?
I saw 'Public Grid.' Can I make my real-time calendar public so people can see when I'm busy and when I'm free before they call?
I use 'Zapier' to connect to my CRM. If I move a job in Jobber, does it update the 'Appointment Time' in my CRM automatically?
I want to see 'Route Density.' Which of my service areas has the most jobs per square mile so I can target my door-hangers better?
I'm ready to close out my year. How do I send a 'Statement' to a client that shows every single thing they paid for in 2025?
